panels.title: Nodes
panels.description: Number of Logstash nodes reporting metrics.

panels.title: Workers
panels.description: Worker threads configured for event processing.

panels.title: Heap %
panels.description: Percentage of allocated JVM heap in use.

panels.title: Uptime
panels.description: Time elapsed since Logstash process started.

panels.title: Queue
panels.description: Events waiting in the persistent queue.

panels.title: Status
panels.description: Operational status of the Logstash node.

panels.title: Backpressure
panels.description: Queue push wait time indicating downstream congestion.

panels.title: Version
panels.description: Logstash version on the selected node.

panels.title: Input Throughput
panels.description: Events received per second across all inputs. Uses pre-computed flow rates that handle restarts gracefully.

panels.title: Output Throughput
panels.description: Events emitted per second across all outputs. Uses pre-computed flow rates that handle restarts gracefully.

panels.title: Worker Utilization
panels.description: Percentage of worker thread capacity in use. Below 20% means workers are mostly idle. Above 70% means workers are busy.

panels.title: Queue Push Latency
panels.description: Average time per event waiting to enter the queue. Rising values indicate queue contention.

panels.title: Event Latency
panels.description: Average time per event to traverse the entire pipeline (filter + output).

panels.title: JVM Heap Used
panels.description: JVM heap memory consumption over time.

panels.title: Process CPU
panels.description: Logstash process CPU utilization over time.

options.content:
### Deep-Dive Dashboards

| Dashboard | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| [Pipeline Metrics](/d/ls-pipeline-metrics) | Pipeline throughput, filter performance, queue utilization |
| [Pipeline Detail](/d/ls-pipeline-detail) | Single-pipeline deep-dive with per-filter breakdown |
| [Node Performance](/d/ls-node-performance) | JVM, thread pools, persistent queues, OS resources |
| [Host Metrics](/d/ls-host-metrics) | OS-level CPU, memory, disk, network for the Logstash host |

title: LS-00 Service Overview
description: Logstash service overview: node status, throughput rates, JVM heap, queue depth, and configuration reloads.
